creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Alternatively, neither comment 0 nor comment 1 provided enough details to reproduce (not even drm-*kmod version). DRI/X11 works fine on my Intel iGPU (Skylake, 0x1912) with drm-515-kmod and mesa-devel: tested Xwayland (sway-devel) and Xorg (dwm + picom or ctwm, modesetting or xf86-video-intel + SNA + DRI3). Like comment 0 I use mpv (mainly with --vo=gpu-next --gpu-api=vulkan --hwdec=vulkan) and like comment 1 I use emacs (mainly -devel and PGTK=on).
